title: Dual Arc Border Flow Curves
description: Every option uses the same white dual-arc border flow. Only the motion curve and rhythm differ.

dualSlowBuild.title: Slow Build
dualSlowBuild.summary: Starts gently, then naturally accelerates along the border.

dualLateSurge.title: Late Surge
dualLateSurge.summary: Holds back longer, then noticeably speeds up near the corner.

dualSoftPulse.title: Soft Breath
dualSoftPulse.summary: Slower and lighter overall, with a softer speed change for longer visible waits.

dualQuickGlide.title: Quick Glide
dualQuickGlide.summary: Starts with a lighter push, then glides smoothly through the rest of the edge.
